scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @nexora/contracts && npm run build -w @nexora/ui
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build:web
scripts.dev:web: npm run build:packages && npm run dev -w @nexora/web
scripts.test: npm run test:web && npm run test:e2e
scripts.validate: npm run build && npm run test && .\mvnw.cmd -q test
